prestazioni: Engine swap to L15B7 (1.5L DOHC i-VTEC Turbo, direct-injection) with Mugen ECU Stage 2 reflash (220 PS @ 6,000 RPM, 253 Nm @ 1,700-4,500 RPM) and custom Mugen-spec forged internals (pistons, connecting rods, and crankshaft) for 9,000 RPM redline capability
Garrett GT2259S turbocharger with Mugen titanium wastegate actuator, custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe, and HKS Hi-Power 70mm blow-off valve for optimized spool and reduced lag

Full Mugen Type-R suspension kit (coilovers with 30-way adjustable damping, 25mm front/20mm rear lowering springs, and reinforced pillowball upper mounts) paired with Tein EnduraPro dampers for track use, plus Mugen 22mm front/19mm rear adjustable sway bars
estetica: Mugen GP Spec front bumper with integrated carbon fiber canards and Mugen RS-style rear diffuser, both in gloss black with red Mugen decals
Mugen RS-II 17-inch forged aluminum wheels (7J front, 7.5J rear) wrapped in Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R tires (205/45 R17 front, 215/40 R17 rear) with Mugen center caps and titanium wheel bolts
Full Mugen carbon fiber aero package (hood, roof, and side skirts) with matte clear coat, paired with a Mugen rear wing (Type-II, 300mm height) and custom LED taillights with sequential turn signals
